vars.TAGLINE: The body's own repair signal, amplified.
vars.BULLET_1: Upregulates growth hormone receptor expression in tendon fibroblasts, accelerating connective tissue repair after mechanical stress.
vars.BULLET_2: Promotes angiogenesis via VEGF pathway activation — driving blood vessel formation to damaged tissue within days.
vars.BULLET_3: Modulates nitric oxide synthesis to reduce systemic inflammation while preserving normal immune function.
vars.CITATION_SHORT: Chang et al., 2011 · J Physiol Pharmacol · PMID: 22146578

vars.QUOTE: Stable pentadecapeptide BPC 157 promotes healing of injured ligaments in rats with a dose-dependent effect.
vars.CITATION_FULL: Staresinic et al. · J Orthop Res · 2003

COMPOUNDS.name: BPC-157
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Accelerates healing of tendons, ligaments, and muscle via VEGF-driven angiogenesis and enhanced growth hormone receptor expression.

COMPOUNDS.name: TB-500
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Thymosin Beta-4 promotes cell migration, reduces inflammation, and restores range of motion in injured musculoskeletal tissue.

COMPOUNDS.name: CJC-1295
COMPOUNDS.explainer: GHRH analogue that extends the half-life of endogenous GH pulses — supporting lean mass accrual and overnight recovery.
